title: AgentContributions
description: Module-level agent contributions for the SDD composition layer. Place this object under the 'agentContributions' key in module.json.

tool-overlays.description: Add tools to existing core agents. Each overlay targets one core agent by slug and appends a list of tool identifiers.

target-agent.description: Slug of the core agent to augment (e.g. 'requirement-analyst').

add-tools.description: Tool identifiers to append to the target agent's tools list.

agents.description: Entirely new agents contributed by this module. Each entry must have a unique slug not present in agents-canonical.json.

ContributedAgent.description: Full definition of a module-contributed agent.

slug.description: Unique identifier for this agent (kebab-case, used as filename stem).

description.description: One-to-three sentence description of the agent's purpose.

model-tier.description: Abstract model tier resolved via constitution Article VI.

instructions.description: Instruction file paths always loaded by this agent.

handoffs.description: Possible handoff transitions to other agents.

label.description: Short label shown in the UI for this handoff.

prompt.description: Prompt text pre-filled when initiating the handoff.

send.description: If false (default), user must confirm before the prompt is sent.
